Instruction *BoUpSLP::getInsertPoint(ArrayRef<Value *> Roots) const {
  assert(!Roots.empty() && "Can't get an insert point for empty roots");

  SmallVector<Instruction *, 8> InstRoots;
  for (Value *V : Roots) {
    if (auto *I = dyn_cast<Instruction>(V))
      InstRoots.push_back(I);
    else
      // Non-instruction roots are not dominated by any instruction, so we can't
